crime.value: Domestic murder by stabbing - husband killed by wife in kitchen, body disposed of from bridge
crime.quote: I plunged the knife into his unprotected throat. He went down, writhing and wiggling in garbled agony

victim.value: Felix - abusive husband who drank and hurt his wife, making him 'killable' due to his domestic violence
victim.quote: Sometimes he'd hurt me but it wasn't his fault. If I would do what I was told, like he said, he wouldn't hurt me

closed_world.value: Domestic household setting - kitchen where murder occurred, isolated enough that screams weren't heard
closed_world.quote: No one had heard him scream from inside the house

culprit_and_motive.value: Wife (narrator) killed Felix to escape domestic abuse - motive was accumulated anger from being hurt
culprit_and_motive.quote: I finally let out all the anger I kept bottled up for so long

investigator.value: Police officers Grant and Maybel investigating the murder, questioning the widow
investigator.quote: I'm Officer Grant...Ma'am I'm terribly sorry to tell you this, but your husband's been murdered

red_herring.value: The nightmare framing - Chapter 1 appears to be real murder, Chapter 2 reveals it as a dream, misdirecting reader about reality
red_herring.quote: I had had a horrible nightmare were I killed Felix. It had felt so...real.

clue_fairness.value: Reader experiences all sensory details of the crime scene - bleach smell, blood description, disposal method
clue_fairness.quote: Remembering the heavy smell of bleach, my head swam. I cleaned off my dishes

social_world.value: Domestic abuse power structure - Felix controls and hurts Annie, she must obey to avoid violence
social_world.quote: Sometimes he'd hurt me but it wasn't his fault. If I would do what I was told, like he said, he wouldn't hurt me.

alibi.value: Annie plans to claim Felix said he was going out at 9 PM and she was sleeping, with backstory of happy marriage
alibi.quote: I'll say that he said he was going out and would be back later at about nine P.M.

media_and_audience.value: Police present Felix's murder as external crime, seeking routine questions from grieving widow
media_and_audience.quote: Ma'am I'm terribly sorry to tell you this, but your husband's been murdered. We need to ask you a few questions

_meta.title: ebook k m montoya who am i really
